headline: The UN warns of unprecedented climate imbalance due to El Ni

stories.title: Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant way
stories.tldr: Gimlet Labs raised $80M to enable AI to run across various chip architectures simultaneously, addressing the inference bottleneck.

stories.title: Littlebird raises $11M for its AI-assisted ‘recall’ tool that reads your computer screen
stories.tldr: Littlebird raised $11M for an AI tool that captures context from your screen in real-time to answer questions and automate tasks.

stories.title: Cursor admits its new coding model was built on top of Moonshot AI’s Kimi
stories.tldr: Cursor admitted its new coding model was built on top of Moonshot AI's Kimi, raising concerns about geopolitical risks.

stories.title: Grab to buy Foodpanda Taiwan from Delivery Hero for $600 million
stories.tldr: Grab is acquiring Foodpanda Taiwan for $600 million, expanding its reach beyond Southeast Asia.

stories.title: Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant way
stories.tldr: Gimlet Labs raised $80M for its tech that enables AI to run across various chip architectures simultaneously, addressing the AI inference bottleneck.

stories.title: UN warns Earth's climate being 'pushed beyond its limits' as El Niño looms
stories.tldr: The UN warns of unprecedented climate imbalance due to El Niño, impacting weather patterns globally.
stories.soWhat: Climate change impacts supply chains, potentially disrupting Sourcy's sourcing operations in Southeast Asia and requiring diversification strategies.
stories.problem: Unpredictable weather patterns threaten agricultural yields and resource availability, increasing sourcing costs and risks.
stories.opportunity: Develop AI-powered risk assessment tools for Sourcy to predict climate-related supply chain disruptions and identify alternative sourcing options.

stories.title: HK police can now demand phone passwords under new national security rules
stories.tldr: Hong Kong police gain power to demand phone passwords, raising data security and privacy concerns.
stories.soWhat: Increased surveillance in Hong Kong could impact data security for Sourcy's suppliers and partners operating there, requiring enhanced encryption and data protection measures.
stories.problem: Erosion of data privacy in Hong Kong creates risks for businesses handling sensitive information, potentially leading to compliance issues and reputational damage.
stories.opportunity: Offer Sourcy's clients enhanced data security and compliance features as a competitive advantage, addressing concerns about operating in regions with heightened surveillance.

stories.title: Indonesia eyes US$4.7 billion in savings to brace for Middle East war impacts
stories.tldr: Indonesia is preparing for potential economic fallout from the Middle East conflict by identifying $4.7 billion in savings and considering measures like remote work.
stories.soWhat: This signals a potential shift in work culture in Indonesia, which could impact Sourcy's B2B sourcing if more companies adopt remote work policies.
stories.problem: Uncertainty in the global economy is forcing Indonesian businesses to re-evaluate operational costs and workforce strategies.
stories.opportunity: Sourcy could position itself as a key partner in helping companies optimize their supply chains and adapt to new remote work environments.

stories.title: Asian stocks tumble as Gulf war rages
stories.tldr: Asian stock markets are experiencing significant declines due to escalating tensions in the Middle East.
stories.soWhat: This market volatility could impact investment decisions and sourcing strategies for Sourcy's clients in the region.
stories.problem: Geopolitical instability creates risk aversion and disrupts supply chains, affecting businesses across Asia.
stories.opportunity: Sourcy can leverage its AI agents to provide real-time risk assessments and alternative sourcing options to help clients navigate market uncertainty.

correlations.connection: Cursor's reliance on Moonshot AI (China) for its coding model raises geopolitical concerns that could impact Indonesian developers and companies using such tools, potentially leading to restrictions or security audits.
correlations.implication: Eugene should evaluate the geopolitical risks associated with AI tools used at Sourcy, especially those with ties to China, and consider diversifying to mitigate potential disruptions.

correlations.connection: Grab's acquisition of Foodpanda Taiwan signals a consolidation trend in the Southeast Asian market, potentially impacting Sourcy's competitive landscape and partnership opportunities.
correlations.implication: Eugene should analyze the implications of this acquisition on Sourcy's market position and explore potential collaborations or strategic moves to maintain competitiveness.

correlations.connection: Indonesia's preparation for economic fallout from the Middle East conflict, including potential remote work measures, could impact Sourcy's operations and supply chain dynamics.
correlations.implication: Eugene should assess Sourcy's supply chain vulnerabilities and develop contingency plans, including remote work strategies, to mitigate potential disruptions from the Middle East conflict.

correlations.connection: Gimlet Labs' $80M funding to solve the AI inference bottleneck could enable more efficient and cost-effective AI applications for startups, including those in Southeast Asia.
correlations.implication: Eugene should explore how Gimlet Labs' technology can be leveraged to improve the performance and reduce the cost of AI agents built for Sourcy's B2B sourcing platform.

actionItems: Develop AI-powered risk assessment tools for Sourcy to predict climate-related supply chain disruptions and identify alternative sourcing options.
Offer Sourcy's clients enhanced data security and compliance features as a competitive advantage, addressing concerns about operating in regions with heightened surveillance.
Sourcy could position itself as a key partner in helping companies optimize their supply chains and adapt to new remote work environments.
